title: CVE-2026-11500: Weaviate RCE
summary: [P1] A vulnerability in Weaviate up to 1.37.7 allows for remote code execution, with no patch available. Exploitation is possible, but no public exploits have been reported yet. Why now: Lack of available patch (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Weaviate is a framework and the vulnerability allows for remote code execution.
